details.test: Task 1: Request earliest weekday bridal trial next month under $150
Task 2: Save three 2024 evening looks with red lipstick to favorites
Task 3: Choose cheaper bridal package including lashes and city travel and start booking
Task 4: Add a $100 digital makeup gift card for a friend to the cart
Task 5: Use contact form to request makeup for a photoshoot for 2 people on a Saturday morning
Task 6: Sign up for the newsletter with Bridal and Special Occasion interests
Task 7: Find 2023 foundation article for oily skin and save to reading list
Task 8: Locate cancellation policy in FAQ and copy its direct link
Task 9: Estimate cost for bride plus 3 bridesmaids and start an inquiry
